company_summary: Docusign is the global leader in electronic signature and agreement management software, serving hundreds of thousands of businesses worldwide. The company has been expanding beyond e-signature into its Intelligent Agreement Management (IAM) platform, using AI to extract insights and automate workflows from contracts and agreements. Their current strategic direction is heavily oriented toward AI-powered document intelligence and enterprise workflow automation.
role_signals: intern-level PM scope with structured mentorship
fit_indicators: B2I PM role focuses on internal tooling — Sudheer built and owned internal tools at RNTBCI (billing, attendance, design approval systems) used daily across Nissan/Renault/Mitsubishi org, a direct parallel

Docusign's IAM platform is AI-first — Sudheer is actively building multi-agent AI systems with Claude API, directly aligned with Docusign's current strategic investment in AI-powered agreement intelligence
Enterprise Java systems at RNTBCI give Sudheer technical credibility to work alongside Docusign engineers and write precise, implementable product specs — important for a technical PM intern role

Legacy modernisation experience at RNTBCI mirrors Docusign's internal challenge of evolving a mature platform — Sudheer understands trade-offs of migrating enterprise systems without disrupting operations

Carlson STEM MBA signals structured PM methodology training layered on top of 4 years of hands-on engineering, matching the hybrid technical-business profile typically sought in Docusign PM internships

contact_targets.title: Senior Product Manager, Internal Platforms or Intelligent Agreement Management
contact_targets.reason: Most likely direct manager or adjacent peer to this intern role — can speak to team fit, day-to-day scope, and advocate internally

contact_targets.title: Engineering Manager or Staff Engineer, Internal Tools
contact_targets.reason: Sudheer's engineering background gives him credibility to have a peer-level technical conversation, and this person can validate cross-functional fit for the role

contact_targets.title: MBA Recruiting Lead or University Programs Manager
contact_targets.reason: For an MBA intern role, the university recruiting team owns the process and can confirm timeline, team placement, and application status
